name: LIFEWAY FOODS INC. Registered S
summary: LifeWay Foods, Inc. is a kefir-focused company producing and marketing probiotic and nutritious foods and beverages. Headquartered in Morton Grove, Illinois, it offers a variety of kefir products, including organic, low-fat, and flavored options, along with other probiotic-based food products. The company distributes its products through retail channels such as grocery stores and natural food stores.
